subcodes.title: Words spoken at Sanderson home in Paris, 1911-10-15
subcodes.first_line: The world of existence can be compared to the human body, and the forces of nature are like the limbs and organs of that body
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم وجود مثل هیکل انسان است قوای مادیه مانند
subcodes.subjects: @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @the human soul, @man's distinction from the animal, @The Holy Spirit, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @soul; spirit after death, @material and spiritual existence; two books
